# Pathfinder 2e Fixture Character Sheets

## Overview

This directory holds real (or synthetic) Pathfinder 2e character sheet PDFs used for
integration testing.  Synthetic PDFs (built with `pypdf` widget annotations) are
sufficient for CI; real Paizo PDFs may be added locally but **must not be committed**
due to licensing constraints (see below).

## File Conventions

| Filename | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| `character.pdf` | Real Paizo fillable PDF — add locally for manual testing only |
| `README.md` | This file |

## Research Briefing (Pathfinder 2e PDF Schema)

### 1. PDF AcroForm Field Schema

Paizo's official fillable PF2e character sheet uses Adobe AcroForm widgets.
Key widget names (field `/T` values) observed on the 2023 Core Rulebook sheet:

| Widget key | Maps to |
|---|---|
| `CharacterName` | `name` |
| `CLASS  LEVEL` | `class_name`, `level` |
| `Ancestry` | `sheet.ancestry` |
| `Heritage` | `sheet.heritage` |
| `Background` | `sheet.background` |
| `STR` / `DEX` / `CON` / `INT` / `WIS` / `CHA` | `sheet.stats.*` |
| `Hit Point Maximum` | `sheet.hp.max` |
| `Armor Class` | `sheet.ac` |
| `Class DC` | `sheet.class_dc` (no 5e equivalent) |
| `Spell DC` | `sheet.spell_dc` (no 5e equivalent) |
| `Focus Points Max` | `sheet.focus.max` (PF2e resource; no 5e equivalent) |
| `Fortitude/Reflex/Will Total` | `sheet.saves.*.total` |
| `Fortitude/Reflex/Will Rank` | `sheet.saves.*.rank` (proficiency rank string) |
| `<Skill> Rank` | `sheet.skills.<Skill>.rank` |
| `Spell Slots L<N> Max` | `sheet.spell_slots.<N>` |
| `Ancestry/Class/Skill/General Feat <N>` | `sheet.feats.<category>[]` |
| `Current Bulk` / `Bulk Limit` | `sheet.bulk.current` / `sheet.bulk.limit` |
| `Character Traits` | `sheet.traits[]` |
| `Equipment <N>` | `sheet.equipment[]` |

### 2. Edition Disambiguation Signals

PF2e sheets are distinguished from PF1e by the presence of **positive** widget
signals: `"Proficiency Rank"`, `"Ancestry"`, `"Heritage"`, `"Focus Points"`,
`"Class DC"`, `"Bulk"`.  PF1e-exclusive signals (`"Base Attack Bonus"`, `"CMB"`,
`"CMD"`, `"Spells Per Day"`) score negatively against PF2e.

### 3. Community Export Tools

- **Pathbuilder 2e** — exports JSON via `/api/character/json/<id>`; field names
  use camelCase (e.g. `keyability`, `ancestry`, `heritage`).  A JSON import path
  is a viable alternative to PDF parsing.
- **Wanderer's Guide** — exports JSON; similar field set.
- **pdfplumber** and **pypdf** can both read AcroForm widget values without
  requiring a proprietary PDF SDK.

### 4. Licensing Constraints

Paizo's character sheet PDFs are released under the **Pathfinder Compatibility
License** and are free to download from paizo.com.  However:

- The PDF files themselves are copyrighted by Paizo Inc.
- **Do not commit the PDF binary to this repository.**
- Synthetic PDFs generated by `pypdf` (as done in CI) contain only the test data
  and carry no IP concerns.
- Field-name strings (e.g. "Ancestry", "Heritage") are descriptive and not
  independently copyrightable.

### 5. Canonical Field-Name Convention

The PF2e community (Pathbuilder, Foundry VTT module, AoN) uses these conventions:

- Ability scores: lowercase three-letter codes (`str`, `dex`, `con`, `int`, `wis`, `cha`)
- Proficiency ranks: lowercase English strings (`untrained`, `trained`, `expert`, `master`, `legendary`)
- System-specific resources use namespaced keys (e.g. `focus`, `bulk`, `class_dc`) rather than
  overloading D&D 5e equivalents (`hp`, `ac`, `proficiency_bonus`)

## Seeded Test Characters

The script `server/scripts/seed_pathfinder_2e_characters.py` imports a canonical
"Seoni, Human Sorcerer 5" character for both `bilbo@example.com` and `admin@example.com`
on each app startup (idempotent).  Both characters are visible in the Admin Panel
under **Characters**.
